Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
60

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
Neptune & Saturn :
Good aspects : gives profound and enthusiastic thoughts, occult science inclination, research and
higher science and close study, relations with intelligent people.
Neptune & Hershel :
Good aspects: liking for science, liking for miracles, travel, novel and new experiences.
Bad aspects: strange imaginations in relation to houses situated & rumours; bad experiences of
accidents, etc. may die or become handicapped.
Pluto :
The author states that not much is known about Pluto as it was discovered recently.
